description_long: This is a modern two-building residential property featuring clean, rectilinear forms and a minimalist aesthetic. The main house is a two-story structure with a flat roof, large windows, and a prominent balcony overlooking a driveway and a carport. The secondary building, also with a flat roof, appears to serve as a guest house or auxiliary space, separated by a landscaped yard with grass, trees, and a small pool. The exterior materials include dark and light cladding, with the main house showcasing a striking contrast between black and light brick or concrete surfaces. The property is enclosed by fencing and includes outdoor amenities such as a patio, deck, and garden areas. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor living spaces and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor environments.
description: A modern two-building house with flat roofs, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and patio. The main house has a balcony, carport, and striking dark and light exterior finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house with a balcony, carport, and large windows, as well as the separate auxiliary building and landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat brick wall of the main house, the pool, patio, and garden areas, with the auxiliary building visible in the background.
description_view_2: Opposite front view displaying the main house's balcony, the auxiliary building's rear, and the full extent of the landscaped yard and fencing.
description_view_3: Back view showing the auxiliary building's flat roof, the pool, and the rear of the main house with its outdoor deck and garden.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door accessed via a paved path, with a balcony above and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing clean lines and functionality.
